2604.13592.title: Foresight Optimization for Strategic Reasoning in Large Language Models
2604.13592.paper_summary: Reasoning capabilities in large language models (LLMs) have generally advanced significantly. However, it is still challenging for existing reasoning-based LLMs to perform effective decision-making abilities in multi-agent environments, due to the absence of explicit foresight modeling. To this end, strategic reasoning, the most fundamental capability to anticipate the counterpart's behaviors and foresee its possible future actions, has been introduced to alleviate the above issues. Strategic reasoning is fundamental to effective decision-making in multi-agent environments, yet existing reasoning enhancement methods for LLMs do not explicitly capture its foresight nature. In this work, we introduce Foresight Policy Optimization (FoPO) to enhance strategic reasoning in LLMs, which integrates opponent modeling principles into policy optimization, thereby enabling explicit consideration of both self-interest and counterpart influence. Specifically, we construct two curated datasets, namely Cooperative RSA and Competitive Taboo, equipped with well-designed rules and moderate difficulty to facilitate a systematic investigation of FoPO in a self-play framework. Our experiments demonstrate that FoPO significantly enhances strategic reasoning across LLMs of varying sizes and origins. Moreover, models trained with FoPO exhibit strong generalization to out-of-domain strategic scenarios, substantially outperforming standard LLM reasoning optimization baselines.
2604.13592.paper_summary_zh: 大型語言模型（LLMs）的推理能力普遍有了顯著的進步。<lb/>然而，現有的基於推理的LLMs在多代理環境中執行有效決策能力仍然具有挑戰性，因為缺乏明確的預見建模。<lb/>為此，戰略推理作為預測對手行為和預見其可能未來行動的最基本能力，已被引入以緩解上述問題。<lb/>戰略推理對於在多代理環境中的有效決策至關重要，然而現有的LLMs推理增強方法並未明確捕捉其預見性質。<lb/>在本研究中，我們引入了預見政策優化（FoPO）來增強LLMs中的戰略推理，該方法將對手建模原則整合到政策優化中，從而使自我利益和對手影響的明確考量成為可能。<lb/>具體而言，我們構建了兩個精心策劃的數據集，即合作RSA和競爭禁忌，這些數據集配備了精心設計的規則和適中的難度，以促進FoPO在自我對弈框架中的系統性研究。<lb/>我們的實驗表明，FoPO顯著增強了不同大小和來源的LLMs的戰略推理能力。<lb/>此外，使用FoPO訓練的模型在域外戰略場景中展現出強大的泛化能力，顯著超越了標準LLM推理優化基準。
2604.13592.author: Jiashuo Wang et.al.
2604.13592.authors: Jiashuo Wang, Jiawen Duan, Jian Wang, Kaitao Song, Chunpu Xu, Johnny K. W. Ho, Fenggang Yu, Wenjie Li, Johan F. Hoorn
